task: Complete the Homepage SAA page (/home-page-saa) to MoMorph spec (screenId i87tDx10uM): wire countdown to event_settings, build minimal notifications system, add profiles.role + admin menu, wire widget button to WriteKudoModal, award-card hash navigation + hash-scroll-on-load on awards page, spec event-info copy, grid/clamp visual fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: Countdown tiles driven by event_settings.launch_at via getCachedLaunchAt + useCountdown; 2-digit 0-padded; updates in real time; at/after zero shows 00 00 00, hides 'Coming soon', and does NOT redirect-loop on the homepage (ID-12, ID-39..43)
notifications table (user_id, title, body, read_at) + RLS + seed rows; bell opens dropdown panel; red badge visible iff unread notifications exist (ID-11, ID-27..29)
profiles.role column (default 'user', one seeded admin); account menu shows Profile + Sign out for all users, plus Admin Dashboard (placeholder route) only for role=admin (ID-5/6, ID-36..38)
Floating widget button opens WriteKudoModal (clarified ID-54)
Award cards: image/title/'Chi tiết' navigate to /home-awards-page#<CARD_ANCHORS slug>; awards page scrolls to the section on load when hash present (ID-47..52, ID-62 tolerates missing hash)
Event info shows spec values: 18h30 / Nhà hát nghệ thuật quân đội / Tường thuật trực tiếp tại Group Facebook Sun* Family (ID-14)
Awards grid 2-col mobile+tablet, 3-col desktop; card description clamped to 2 lines with ellipsis (ID-15/16)
Existing i18n VN/EN switch, auth gating, logout unaffected (ID-24..26, ID-36); vitest suite, lint, and next build pass
touchpoints: components/home/* (site-header, user-menu, hero-countdown, hero-widget-button, award-card, awards-section)
blastRadius: messages/*.json (all pages read translations; parity test guards)
supabase schema/seed (db reset flow; RLS must not break existing tables)
components/home-awards-page/* (hash-scroll addition; existing menu-driven scroll must keep working)

new app/admin placeholder route (middleware auth gating applies)
contracts: useCountdown(launchAt: Date | null): CountdownParts — ticks 1s, currently router.replace('/') at zero (prelaunch behavior; homepage needs non-redirecting variant)
getCachedLaunchAt(): Promise<Date | null> — 60s TTL cache, never throws
